repo_prior_art.cite: ThmSmith/doc/API.md §3 has no PartialID representation-distortion entry; pid_network_exposure is graph-completion ADE bounds, not learned-representation selector LP

published_prior_art.cite: ManskiTamer2002, BeresteanuMolchanovMolinari2011/2012, and Ura2018 cover interval/random-set/measurement-error sharp regions, but not text/image oracle-representation selectors

repo_prior_art.cite: ThmSmith/doc/API.md §3 plus pid_network_exposure/pid_dose_response_shape/pid_long_term_surrogate contain no epsilon-fiber representation-distortion frontier

published_prior_art.cite: BeresteanuMolchanovMolinari2012: random-set partial identification and Aumann/Choquet machinery are a close general template; the text/image selector semantics are application-specific

repo_prior_art.cite: No in-catalogue ThmSmith proposal states a no-selector-free endpoint or epsilon-fiber-invariance boundary for learned treatment representations

published_prior_art.cite: FongGrimmer2023 and EgamiFongGrimmerRobertsStewart2022 identify latent/text-representation identification risks; ImaiNakamura2024TextTreatments and CorcollAndreuVlontzosORiordanGilliganLee2026 impose stronger representation conditions rather than this boundary

repo_prior_art.cite: No repo proposal names epsilon-fiber invariance as a singleton certificate for representation-distortion envelopes

published_prior_art.cite: Routine interval algebra: singleton envelope iff relevant fiber oscillations vanish; useful diagnostic, not a standalone published-level novelty kernel

novelty_flags.label: Proposal tier
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the current kernel is a well-positioned representation-distortion application of Manski/BMM random-set envelope logic, but needs a genuinely nontrivial generic-class obstruction or estimator-specific theorem to reach flagship.

soundness_flags.label: Exact-recovery reduction
soundness_flags.one_line: The continuous-version epsilon=0 branch invokes pointwise target evaluation even though B_epsilon was defined through essential extrema only on positive-mass fibers; explicitly extend B_0 or restrict this corollary to atoms.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Tie Conjecture 2 to a specific quoted estimand or estimator from ImaiNakamura2024TextTreatments or CorcollAndreuVlontzosORiordanGilliganLee2026, then prove the open-class obstruction for that published workflow rather than for a generic selector-free endpoint.

Add a nontrivial coupling restriction beyond free selectors, such as selectors induced by a representation-training or generative-object mechanism, and show the envelope either remains sharp or tightens in a way not covered by standard random-set bounds.
Patch the epsilon=0 sanity corollary by defining a separate point-evaluation functional for continuous identified versions, leaving the essential-envelope B_epsilon only for positive-mass fibers.

recommended_next_step: Revise for the flagship floor: add an estimator-specific generic-class obstruction and fix the epsilon=0 continuous-target convention before Stage 0.
